subject: The JB.AI Weekly #3: How to calculate the cost of missed calls for your busi...
focus: How AI Voice Bots help local service businesses never miss a call
spotlight: 🌐 General — AI Benefits for Any Business

sections.mainTip:
Here's how to calculate what every missed call actually costs your business.

• **Track your average customer value** - Multiply your typical service price by how many times customers return. A $200 plumbing job with 2 repeat visits = $600 lifetime value.

• **Monitor your conversion rate** - If 3 out of 10 callers book services, you have a 30% conversion rate from calls to customers.

• **Calculate daily missed calls** - Check your phone logs or ask your team how many calls go unanswered during busy periods, after hours, or when you're on job sites.

• **Do the math** - 5 missed calls × 30% conversion rate × $600 customer value = $900 lost revenue per day.

• **Consider peak times** - Evenings and weekends often have the highest missed call rates but also the most urgent, high-value customers.

• **Deploy AI voice bots** - They answer every call 24/7, qualify leads, and book appointments automatically, capturing revenue you'd otherwise lose.
sections.newsRoundup:
# This Week in AI

**Voice AI Adoption Surges as Small Businesses Plan 24/7 Phone Support**
64% of small businesses plan to adopt chatbot technology by end of 2026, with 45% including voice capabilities as text-to-speech quality reaches near-human levels and speech-to-text latency drops below 200ms.
• Why it matters: Small businesses can now offer round-the-clock phone support without staffing costs, cutting customer service expenses by 30%.

**AI Marketing Tools Help 80% of Small Businesses Reclaim Time and Boost Revenue**
More than 80% of small businesses expected to use AI for marketing by year-end, with 66% reporting revenue growth and owners reclaiming 5-6 hours weekly.
• Why it matters: AI has evolved from a tool to a strategic asset, with skills becoming a key differentiator for SMB growth.

**Voice Agent Market Hits Tipping Point with $0.40 Per Call Costs**
87.5% of builders actively developing voice agents as technology costs drop to $0.40 per call versus $7-12 for human agents, with platforms like Rime powering 100+ million monthly conversations.
• Why it matters: Small businesses can now compete with enterprises through AI agents offering 75% cost reduction per call.
sections.toolOfWeek:
🛠️ **Calendly** — Seamless appointment scheduling that integrates with your AI conversations.

• Automates booking, rescheduling, and cancellations while syncing with your existing calendar systems
• Hair salon's AI chatbot captures service preferences, then hands off to Calendly for instant appointment booking with the right stylist
• Set buffer times between AI-scheduled appointments to account for service overruns and give staff breathing room
sections.statOfWeek:
Based on my research, here's a compelling AI chatbot statistic for local small businesses:

📊 **Small and medium businesses using AI chatbots are growing at a 25.1% CAGR, achieving first-year ROI of 340%** — [Nextiva](https://www.nextiva.com/blog/conversational-ai-statistics.html)

• **Cost savings**: AI chatbots handle interactions for roughly $0.50 vs. $6 for human agents - a 90% cost reduction
• **Time recovery**: Companies receiving 30 daily questions save 10+ hours weekly by automating repetitive inquiries  
• **24/7 revenue**: Capture leads outside business hours when competitors are offline, preventing lost sales to competitors
sections.spotlight:
**Why AI Bots Matter for Every Business**

Every missed opportunity costs your business real money—here's how AI bots fix that.

• **Hidden drain**: Businesses lose $62 billion annually from missed calls, with each unanswered call costing an average of $1,200 in lost revenue

• **24/7 lead capture**: AI chatbots work while you sleep, capturing and qualifying prospects around the clock when competitors' phones go to voicemail

• **End phone tag**: AI voice bots handle appointment scheduling and basic inquiries instantly, eliminating the 2.3 back-and-forth calls typical customers endure

• **ROI reality**: Save 5 hours weekly = $15,000+ annually in recovered productivity at standard business rates

AI bots aren't replacing humans—they're freeing you to focus on what matters most.
